---
title: "Antara's ePortfolio"
author: "Antara Sudhir"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
---

## About
I am a graduate student pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University.

## Python Demo

```{python}
import pandas as pd

data = {"Skill": ["SQL", "Python", "R"], "Category": ["Database", "Programming", "Statistics"]}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
print(df)
```
